algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived interior signage production criteria
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: construction-document signage schedule and fabrication review. The optimizer emphasizes production control and schedule compliance while retaining the source-grounded visual character proportion rule.

scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction-document signage fabrication review variant with production tolerance score and schedule-review context.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize fabrication control and signage schedule review over general readability optimization

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction-document signage fabrication review variant with production tolerance score and schedule-review context.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains abs() readability and fabrication-tolerance helper expressions.
